name: Apple Nut Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core and slice the apple, and cook with the orange juice until soft.
2. Mash or puree, stir in the egg yolk and almonds, and bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until set. Serve hot or cold.
To vary: Use other fruit in season.
From "The Best Healthy Baby Cookbook" By Carol Hunter
